ideas.title: MOONSHOT: ⌘K command palette for content discovery
ideas.why: Signal: destination-lens navigation (borrowing ⌘K from Linear/Vercel docs) — NOT a shell; fuzzy jump-to-post/concept/tab. Grounds in 'Software cartography'.

ideas.title: MOONSHOT: sandboxed, auditable agent-run trail viewer
ideas.why: Signal: HN coding-agent-security anxiety + 'Blast-radius containment'/'Agent execution tracing' — a read-only, verifiable per-run audit view answering 'what did the agent touch?'.

ideas.title: MOONSHOT: scrubbable WebGL time-travel replay of the pipeline
ideas.why: Signal: today's grounded HN opportunity (flight-globe/personal-data viz appeal) + 'Agent execution tracing' — a scrubbable timeline of every autonomous run as an explorable, auditable trail.

ideas.title: MOONSHOT: live 3D force-directed graph of the 477-concept ontology
ideas.why: Signal: HN 'interactive personal-data viz' trend + 'Ontology learning'/'Entity resolution' — turn the brain's own knowledge into a navigable WebGL graph you click into per concept.

ideas.title: RSS autodiscovery + JSON-LD BlogPosting schema
ideas.why: Signal: audience-growth gap — the feed exists but isn't discoverable; grounds in 'Algorithm-aware content formatting' — search/readers can't subscribe without a <link rel=alternate> and structured data (borrowing SEO hygiene from Josh Comeau's blog).

ideas.title: prefers-reduced-motion guard on scroll-driven animations
ideas.why: Signal: accessibility gap on the 'Scroll-driven animation' concept — motion currently runs unconditionally, an a11y defect for vestibular users.
